calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George McNitt appeared by zoom for Jessica Ingram (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it is prepared to take this matter under submission, that it is not sure it will grant the relief prayed in every case that presented facts like this, and spoke of the difficult circumstances and the Decedent's Parents living in the United Kingdom. Mr. McNitt stated that prior to this probate they tried other ways to get these funds under Probate Code 13100 and that it was unacceptable by the financial institutions because there were no social security numbers. The First and Final Report of Administrator and Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
